homepage.text_excerpt:
Homepage - Reggiana Riduttori
ATTENZIONE!!!
Stai utilizzando un browser obsoleto,
aggiornalo all'ultima versione
per visualizzare correttamente i contenuti di questo sito web.
Offering customized products means offering a service exceeding expectations
Ours is unlimited customer care: customers will be supported by our worldwide sales and service network.
Watch the video
Flexibility brings innovation and design together around the world
Flexibility is the winning feature that allows us to offer customers product customization combined with the benefits of manufacturing processes in Industry 4.0.
Learn More
One value, one goal, one method: quality management system
Reggiana Riduttori's Quality Management System is much more than just a protocol.
Learn More
Unique in its kind,
for 50 years
At Reggiana Riduttori we have been passionately designing and building planetary gears, gearmotors and wheel gears entirely Made in Italy for 50 years, combining co-design, quality and flexibility.
Our history
What services do you need?
Worldwide customer service
Our sales and service network will support you worldwide
Contact our sales department
Customized gearboxes
Products and services tailored to your needs
Contact our support team
The guarantee of Made in Italy
Certified high quality products
Learn about our certifications
Configure your products
Use our tool and configure your product
Move to the configurator
MARKETS
A tailor-made gearbox for every area of application
Our long and extensive experience in the gearbox industry has enabled us to develop great expertise in providing the right product for the best performance in every market.
Discover all markets
Agriculture & Forestry
Reggiana Riduttori's gearboxes
are the result of the company’s long engineering experience in the agricultural sector. Designed to be sturdy and easily installed on
mixer wagons, self-propelled machines,
Discover more
Marine & Offshore
Reggiana Riduttori
is positioned as a global leader in the design and manufacture of power transmissions suited to the needs of the marine and offshore industries.
Discover more
Mining Industry
Reggiana Riduttori
’s extensive experience in engineering, combined with continuous attention to the latest innovations, widens the range of solutions for the mining industry.
Discover more
Mobile
Reggiana Riduttori
, with half a century of engineering experience, is one of the leading global manufacturers of power transmissions for the mobile industry.
Discover more
Recycling
Reggiana Riduttori
offers complete power transmission solutions in material recycling and wastewater plants, thus contributing to environmental sustainability through its many years of engineering experience.
Discover more
Sugar
Reggiana Riduttori
is a leading designer and manufacturer of
gearboxes for the sugar production industry.
Discover more
Agriculture & Forestry
Reggiana Riduttori's gearboxes
are the result of the company’s long engineering experience in the agricultural sector.

products.text:
Services - Reggiana Riduttori
ATTENZIONE!!!
Stai utilizzando un browser obsoleto,
aggiornalo all'ultima versione
per visualizzare correttamente i contenuti di questo sito web.
Home
Services
Services
SERVICES
UNLIMITED CUSTOMER CARE
A high-end product needs an equally efficient system of services available to the customer that keeps its promise of quality – made at the time of purchase – in the after-sale as well as in the long run.
That’s why we invest so much in customer support for our own manufactured speed gearboxes, gearmotors, wheel gears and negative brakes, so that it is an added value for our brand.
HIGHLIGHTS OF OUR MAIN SERVICES
Ability to customize the product range
Dedicated customer support
A worldwide network of branches and distributors to offer on-site service and express delivery
3D Configurator
Team dedicated to spare part service
Installation and consulting service
On-site testing
Sales staff undergoing continuous technical training
Contact us
Do you need information about our products?
Fill out the form, choose between our sales department and after-sales support, and you will be contacted

Fax +39 0522 874321
